vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp vô song, không gì sánh bằng
vocab.example: I am obsessed with photographing the unrivaled beauty of the highlands during the rainy season.

vocab.meaning: lột tả được linh hồn/bản chất của thứ gì đó
vocab.example: A good landscape photographer doesn't just take a picture; they try to capture the essence of the place.

vocab.meaning: sự huy hoàng/tráng lệ của thiên nhiên
vocab.example: Whenever I travel, I make it a point to document the natural splendor of the national parks.

vocab.meaning: địa hình hiểm trở, gồ ghề
vocab.example: I find that the rugged terrain of the rocky coastline makes for incredibly compelling black-and-white photos.

vocab.meaning: cái nhìn bao quát toàn cảnh
vocab.example: From the summit, the panoramic sweep of the valley below is simply too good to pass up.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí thanh bình, tĩnh lặng
vocab.example: I love taking pictures of lakes at dawn because the serene atmosphere is reflected perfectly in the still water.

vocab.meaning: đẹp như tranh vẽ một cách ấn tượng
vocab.example: The small mountain villages are stunningly picturesque, especially when the morning mist rolls in.

vocab.meaning: tác động về mặt thị giác
vocab.example: The juxtaposition of the red desert sand against the blue sky creates a powerful visual impact in my shots.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh hùng vĩ, đầy kịch tính
vocab.example: Iceland is a dream for any photographer because of its dramatic scenery, from volcanoes to glaciers.
I've dabbled in amateur photography for years, primarily focusing on sea-themed landscapes.
